_meta.description: R2B artist-name diagnostic: Nirvana (Grunge / alt-rock). Artist named in caption. 1 seed. Locked 2026-05-17.

captions.ace_step: Grunge alt-rock song in the style of Nirvana, 116 BPM, loud-quiet dynamics, clean chorused verse guitar to distorted chorus guitar, simple powerful drumming, throat-strained male vocal mumbled verse and shouted chorus, angsty disaffected mood, raw lo-fi production

lyrics:
[Intro]

[Verse]
Bought the magazine again to feel less alone
All the smiling people sold me back my own face
Television says my generation found a meaning
I missed the meeting must have been asleep again

[Chorus]
Hey hey hey I'm not the type to figure out
Hey hey hey I'm not the type to make it count
Hey hey hey I never asked for anything
And I got all of it just the same

[Verse]
Sister's voice through the apartment wall reminds me
I forgot to call my mother on her birthday
Counting all the people who I owe an explanation
Counting all the explanations I won't give

[Chorus]
Hey hey hey I'm not the type to figure out
Hey hey hey I'm not the type to make it count
Hey hey hey I never asked for anything
And I got all of it just the same

[Bridge]
And I got all of it the same
And I got all of it the same
